_ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" class="usa-alert usa-alert--info usa-alert--no-icon"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" class="usa-alert__body"><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" class="usa-alert__text text-bold"> Need DSLD data? We offer three ways to package and utilize data: </p><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" class="usa-alert__text"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> Read the <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">API Guide</a> below to utilize DSLD data in real time </li><li _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> Download the entire database (as <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.ods.od.nih.gov/staging-s3/data/DSLD-full-database-XLSX.zip">Excel</a>, <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.ods.od.nih.gov/staging-s3/data/DSLD-full-database-CSV.zip">CSV</a>, or <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.ods.od.nih.gov/staging-s3/data/DSLD-full-database-JSON.zip">JSON</a>) </li><li _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""><a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" routerlink="/search/*/bWFya2V0X3N0YXR1cz1hbGwvc29ydD1uZXdlc3QvcGFnZV9zaXplPTIwLw" href="/search/*/bWFya2V0X3N0YXR1cz1hbGwvc29ydD1uZXdlc3QvcGFnZV9zaXplPTIwLw">Search the database</a>, filter your results, and download a subset (Excel, CSV, or JSON file) </li></ul></div></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" id="what"><h3 _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">What's Available</h3><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> The DSLD REST API provides access to the product labels, brands, and ingredient information available in NIH's Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD). It is designed for: </p><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""><li _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> developers incorporating dietary supplement data into applications </li><li _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> data scientists using automated scripts to query and retrieve dietary supplement data for research or analysis purposes. </li></ul><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> The API provides multiple <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">endpoints</a> that fetch data for individual product labels or ingredients, query lists of labels, brands or ingredient groups, and retrieve sets of labels based on complex search and filter criteria. </p><hr _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" id="access"><h3 _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">Gaining Access</h3><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> Anyone may access the DSLD API up to 1,000 API requests per hour per IP address. For a higher <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">rate limit</a>, you may <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.data.gov/signup/" target="_blank">sign up to obtain an API key</a><a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" routerlink="/exit-disclaimer" title="External Website" href="/exit-disclaimer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" src="./assets/images/exitdisclaimer.gif" height="12" width="12" alt="external link disclaimer"></a> from the data.gov Developer Network. Follow these <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.data.gov/docs/api-key/" target="_blank">instructions for how to use your key</a><a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" routerlink="/exit-disclaimer" title="External Website" href="/exit-disclaimer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" src="./assets/images/exitdisclaimer.gif" height="12" width="12" alt="external link disclaimer"></a>. </p><hr _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" id="limits"><h3 _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">Rate Limits</h3><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> DSLD API requests have a default limit of 1,000 requests per hour per IP address, as this is adequate for most applications. Users with an <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://api.data.gov/signup/" target="_blank">API key</a><a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" routerlink="/exit-disclaimer" title="External Website" href="/exit-disclaimer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" src="./assets/images/exitdisclaimer.gif" height="12" width="12" alt="external link disclaimer"></a> have a limit of 10,000 requests per hour. Exceeding this limit will cause the API key to be temporarily blocked for 1 hour. Contact <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="mailto:ODScomments@mail.nih.gov">ODScomments@mail.nih.gov</a> if a higher request rate setting is needed. </p><hr _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" id="license"><h3 _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="">Licensing</h3><p _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""> DSLD data are in the public domain and they are not copyrighted. They are published under <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/" target="_blank">CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0)</a><a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" routerlink="/exit-disclaimer" title="External Website" href="/exit-disclaimer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" src="./assets/images/exitdisclaimer.gif" height="12" width="12" alt="external link disclaimer"></a>. No permission is needed for their use, but we request that developers list DSLD as the source of the data, and when possible, notify us of the product that uses the data so we may better track how DSLD is being used in the public domain. The suggested citation is: </p><blockquote _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" class="line-height-sans-3"> National Institutes of Health, Office of Dietary Supplements. Dietary Supplement Label Database, 2026. <a _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001="" href="https://dsld.od.nih.gov/">https://dsld.od.nih.gov/</a>. </blockquote><hr _ngcontent-ng-c1166303001=""></div><div
